name: Adison Edwards
abilities: ★ The Gun Show — the muscle and the blade of the Hogs, and one of only two scratch-caliber players who stand clear of the whole field. One of the two forever Ryder Cup captains (with Josh): lowest gross earns the armband. Mike's own "Sir Eldrick Tiger Woods."
The Record. Pairs Champion in 2024 with Mike Praught (285), and the field's lowest index at 1.4. Net finishes — '22 · 11th   '23 · 12th   '25 · 16th.
flavor: “If I have to make the sacrifice of playing golf, then so be it.”
caption: Adison Edwards · Truffle Hogs 🐗
